risk_description: Inconsistent financial state between internal ledger and payment gateways (Stripe/Wise) due to webhook failures or distributed transaction errors.
root_cause: Reliance on asynchronous webhooks and external API availability without distributed transaction management (Saga pattern).
mitigation_strategy: Implement strict idempotency keys for all financial transactions. Design webhook handlers to be idempotent with signature verification. Implement a nightly reconciliation cron job to compare internal ledger vs. Gateway reports.
contingency_plan: Develop a manual reconciliation UI for Finance Managers to correct ledger entries based on Gateway source of truth.
monitoring_trigger: Webhook processing failure rate > 1% or 'Ledger Mismatch' alerts from reconciliation job.

risk_description: AI-driven SOW extraction fails to identify or redact PII correctly, leading to data privacy violations (GDPR) when data is passed to downstream matching services.
root_cause: Non-deterministic nature of LLMs and variability in SOW document formats (PDF/Docx structures).
mitigation_strategy: Implement a deterministic pre-processing step using AWS Comprehend for PII detection prior to LLM submission. Enforce 'Human-in-the-Loop' review (US-034) before data persistence. Use zero-retention API policies.
contingency_plan: Fallback to manual data entry mode if automated extraction confidence scores drop below threshold.
monitoring_trigger: AI extraction confidence score < 85% or detection of PII patterns in sanitized storage bucket.

risk_description: Kubernetes (EKS) complexity and cost overruns due to improper resource requests/limits and Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) misconfiguration.
root_cause: High complexity of managing multi-AZ EKS cluster with autoscaling for varying workloads (API vs AI Worker).
mitigation_strategy: Implement Kubecost for real-time cost monitoring. Use Terraform to enforce resource quotas. rigorously load test HPA configurations using K6 to tune scale-up/scale-down velocity.
contingency_plan: Restrict autoscaling limits and manually scale nodes during peak events until configuration is tuned.
monitoring_trigger: Cloud spend deviation > 20% forecast or Pod Pending status duration > 2 minutes.

risk_description: Vector similarity search (pgvector) latency exceeds 250ms p95 requirement as the dataset scales, degrading user experience during vendor matching.
root_cause: Inadequate indexing (IVFFlat vs HNSW) or lack of read replicas for compute-intensive vector distance calculations.
mitigation_strategy: Mandate HNSW index usage for vector columns. Implement Redis caching for frequent search queries. Offload read queries to RDS read replicas.
contingency_plan: Reduce vector dimensionality (e.g., from 1536 to 768) to improve speed at cost of minor accuracy loss.
monitoring_trigger: Database CPU utilization > 70% or Average Query Latency > 200ms.

risk_description: Dependency on OpenAI API availability and rate limits causes bottlenecks in the SOW processing worker queue.
root_cause: Strict API rate limits on LLM providers and lack of control over third-party uptime.
mitigation_strategy: Implement robust exponential backoff and jitter in the SQS consumer. Architect the system to handle 'Processing' state indefinitely without timing out client requests. Purchase provisioned throughput if volume warrants.
contingency_plan: Implement circuit breaker pattern to temporarily queue requests without processing attempts during outages.
monitoring_trigger: SQS Dead Letter Queue count > 10 or API 429 Error rate > 5%.

risk_description: RBAC Implementation gaps in NestJS Guards allow unauthorized access to sensitive financial endpoints or Admin functions.
root_cause: Complexity of mapping Cognito Groups to internal permissions and potential missing decorators on controllers.
mitigation_strategy: Implement a 'Secure by Default' global guard that requires explicit public decorators for non-secure routes. Write integration tests specifically targeting permission escalation attempts.
contingency_plan: Immediate rollback of deployment and emergency patch if privilege escalation is detected.
monitoring_trigger: Audit logs showing '403 Forbidden' spikes on sensitive endpoints from non-admin users.
